review_text: James found us a flat off-market, negotiated £18,000 off the asking price, and coordinated everything. Completion was 7 weeks from offer. We had no idea what we were doing and felt completely guided throughout. Cannot recommend enough.

Bought a 5-bedroom home in Surrey entirely remotely. Priya handled every site visit, due diligence report, and legal question on my behalf. I never set foot in the property until completion day. Flawless service.

Third property I've bought through Advaith. Average yield across my portfolio is 7.4%. They genuinely understand investment criteria - not just 'nice homes'. The off-market access alone makes the fee worthwhile.
After two failed offers on homes we found ourselves, we brought in Advaith. They found a better property within three weeks and we got it first time. Three months of stress gone in three weeks.
Developers are very savvy. Tom explained exactly what was negotiable and secured a parking space, £5k in extras, and a better completion date. The fee paid for itself three times over.
School catchments, planning applications, flood risk, Japanese knotweed - they checked everything. We bought knowing exactly what we were getting. No surprises after completion whatsoever.
result: Full due diligence on family home

review_text: As an overseas buyer I had no idea how the UK buying process worked. Advaith held my hand through every step - from mortgage referral to legal coordination. I now own a pied-à-terre in Kensington without once feeling overwhelmed.
We were in a difficult chain and nearly lost our dream home twice. Advaith kept the pressure on all parties and got us to exchange in 11 weeks. Their chain management alone was worth every penny.

I was convinced I couldn't afford anything good in Birmingham. Within a fortnight, they had found an off-market Victorian terrace £30k under my budget. I had no idea the off-market world even existed.

Running the numbers on BTL is where most agents fail - they just want to sell you something. Advaith actually built a full yield analysis, stress-tested the mortgage rate, and walked away from two deals that didn't stack up. That integrity is rare.

I was negotiating directly with a developer's sales team and losing ground every call. Advaith took over the negotiation, secured a fully furnished show home at a 6% discount, and saved me £14,500 versus my original offer.

Our third move and the smoothest by far. Advaith sourced a property we'd have never found on Rightmove, handled a complex leasehold query that nearly derailed the deal, and kept us sane throughout. Would not buy without them again.
